title: Multibao Electric Glass Kettle 2L 1800W Fast Boiling Tea Kettle Hot Water Boiler with Auto Shut Off, Boil-Dry Protection, BPA-Free Plastic-Free Interior, Blue LED Light, UKCA and ROHS approved
features: Fast Boiling: 1800W rapid heating quickly brings water to a boil for tea, coffee, oatmeal, and more.
2 Litre Capacity: Large enough for multiple servings while still compact for most countertops.
Borosilicate Glass, Safe & Durable: Heat-resistant, durable, and crystal clear.
Multiple Safety Protections: Features auto shut-off and boil-dry protection for worry-free boiling.
BPA-Free & Plastic-Free Interior – Safe for healthy, great-tasting water
Blue LED Light: Illuminates during boiling for visibility and a modern look.
Sleek & Stylish Design: Clean lines and a transparent glass body complement any kitchen style; quiet boil helps reduce noise.
description: Multibao Electric Glass Kettle 2L 1800W Fast Boiling Tea Kettle Hot Water Boiler with Auto Shut Off, Boil-Dry Protection, BPA-Free Plastic-Free Interior, Quiet Boil, Blue LED Light UK Company, UK Brand: MULTIBAO UKCA and ROHS approved, designed for quality and safety Bullet Points: Fast Boiling: 1800W rapid heating quickly brings water to a boil for tea, coffee, oatmeal, and more. 2 Litre Capacity: Large enough for multiple servings while still compact for most countertops. Borosilicate Glass, Safe & Durable: Heat-resistant, durable, and crystal clear. Multiple Safety Protections: Features auto shut-off and boil-dry protection for worry-free boiling. BPA-Free & Plastic-Free Interior – Safe for healthy, great-tasting water Blue LED Light: Illuminates during boiling for visibility and a modern look. Sleek & Stylish Design: Clean lines and a transparent glass body complement any kitchen style; quiet boil helps reduce noise. Product Description: The Multibao Electric Glass Kettle combines speed, safety, and style to make hot water easier than ever. Its 1800W heating system boils water rapidly, so you spend less time waiting and more time enjoying your favourite hot drinks or preparing instant meals.Crafted from high-quality borosilicate glass, 2-liter borosilicate glass body is durable, heat-resistant, and easy to clean, while the BPA-free, plastic-free interior helps keep your water pure. Safety is a priority with auto shut-off and boil-dry protection, which automatically turn the kettle off when water reaches a boil or if it’s accidentally run empty. Enjoy a quieter boiling experience with low-noise operation, and watch the water heat up through the elegant blue LED illumination. With its sleek, modern design, the Multibao Electric Kettle is a perfect blend of performance, safety, and style for any kitchen. Whether you’re a tea lover, coffee enthusiast, or just need hot water for daily tasks, the Multibao Electric Glass Kettle is a reliable and attractive addition to your kitchen. Package include: 1x Multibao Electric Glass Kettle 2L 1800W
